form.formComment: Last start by 5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Albion Park (2:02.70) beating Sweet Charmer in MAIDEN on March 30 at $2. Draws to advantage and expected to go well again.

formComments.comment: Last start by 5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Albion Park (2:02.70) beating Sweet Charmer in MAIDEN on March 30 at $2. Draws to advantage and expected to go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke free of interference around the 200m.
Broke gait on the turn out of the back straight in the final lap.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Lucky Luda at this track over 2040m in a Up to 1 LTW on March 25 at $8. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Miki Moo at this track over 1780m in a Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $8. Rates highly and should be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to shift out under pressure in the run to the finish

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr5) over 1780m after racing wide at this track, beaten 22 m by Miki Moo (2:08.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 1 at $21. Showed ability the run before when he posted a big 6 m win when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:11.50) beating Exit Stage Left in MAIDEN on March 25 at $2.40. A big run would not surprise.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 35 m by Amylee (2:09.40) in Up to 1 LTW on April 2 at $61. Two runs back 3rd (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 30 m by Real Miki (2:09.80) in Up to 1 LTW on March 26 at $18. Prefer others on this occasion.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr3) over 2040m at this track beaten 60 m by Lucky Luda (2:30.50) in Up to 1 LTW on March 25 at $51. form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was well beaten after breaking at this track on March 26. Showed ability the outing before when she posted a big 55 m win as favourite (Fr6) at this track (2:12.80) beating Ninetysevenchevy in MAIDEN on March 19 at $1.25. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Much Bettor at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 51 to 57 on March 27 at $5.50. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Amylee at this track over 1780m in a Up to 1 LTW on April 2 at $4.60. With even luck is a winning chance.
